_comment_1: Paste your school's ICS calendar URL below
_comment_2: Where to save the filtered file (docs/ folder is served by GitHub Pages)
_comment_3: KEEP_DAYS_BACK: Drop events older than this many days.  0 = keep all past events.
_comment_4: EXCLUDE_KEYWORDS: Hide any event containing these words anywhere in title/description/location (case-insensitive)
EXCLUDE_EXACT: Hide events with this exact title (case-insensitive). Use this when a keyword would be too broad.
_comment_5: EXCLUDE_PATTERNS: Regex patterns matched against event title. For advanced filtering.
_comment_6: INCLUDE_KEYWORDS: If non-empty, ONLY events matching at least one keyword are kept (after excludes). Leave empty to keep everything not excluded.
